query: SELECT id, valorVenda, LENGTH(CAST(anexos AS CHAR)) as tamanho_anexos, JSON_LENGTH(anexos) as num_anexos, SUBSTRING(CAST(anexos AS CHAR), 1, 500) as inicio_anexos FROM contratos ORDER BY JSON_LENGTH(anexos) DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT id, valorVenda, LENGTH(CAST(anexos AS CHAR)) as tamanho_anexos, JSON_LENGTH(anexos) as num_anexos, SUBSTRING(CAST(anexos AS CHAR), 1, 500) as inicio_anexos FROM contratos ORDER BY JSON_LENGTH(anexos) DESC LIMIT 3;
